ab: I Fata’an ko loma’ no niyam.
Lalima^ ko paro^ no loma’ niyam.
en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Makomad kako a maro’ aci mama^, ci ina^, ci kaka to fa’inayan ato kaka^ to fafahiyan.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: Takaraw ci mama^ ako; o tayring ci mama^ ako.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: Makopit ci ina^ ako; o ising ci ina^ ako.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: MisanoPangcah a somowal ci mama^ i tamiyanan i loma’.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Pangcah language with us at home.

ab: Minokay kami i niyaro’ i pipahanhanan a romi’ad.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: Makomod kako aci kaka^ a milepel to takola^.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Maolah kako to paro^ no loma’ niyam.
en: I like our family very much.
